Admissions

Begin your child's journey to excellence at Elyon Schools. Our admission process is designed to be simple and straightforward. Apply online and track your application status at every step.

Admission Process

Follow these simple steps to apply for admission to Elyon Schools.

1

Complete Application Form

Fill out the online application form with student and guardian information. Upload required documents.

2

Pay Application Fee

Submit the non-refundable application fee of ₦10,000 through our secure online payment system.

3

Entrance Assessment

Students applying for Primary 2 and above will take an entrance assessment to determine appropriate placement.

4

Admission Decision

You will receive an admission decision within 5-7 working days. Successful applicants can then complete enrollment.

Required Documents

Please prepare the following documents for your application.

Nursery School
  • Birth Certificate or Age Declaration
  • Passport photographs (4 copies)
  • Immunization records
  • Parent/Guardian ID card
Primary School
  • Birth Certificate or Age Declaration
  • Passport photographs (4 copies)
  • Previous school report card (if applicable)
  • Transfer certificate (if applicable)
  • Parent/Guardian ID card
Secondary School
  • Birth Certificate or Age Declaration
  • Passport photographs (4 copies)
  • Previous school report cards (last 2 years)
  • Transfer certificate
  • Testimonial from previous school
  • Parent/Guardian ID card

Fees Structure

2024/2025 Academic Session fees. All fees are per term.

LevelTuition (Per Term)Admission Fee (One-time)
Nursery (Pre-Nursery to Nursery 2)₦150,000₦50,000
Primary (Primary 1 to Primary 6)₦200,000₦75,000
Junior Secondary (JSS 1 to JSS 3)₦250,000₦100,000
Senior Secondary (SSS 1 to SSS 3)₦300,000₦125,000

* Fees are subject to annual review. Additional fees may apply for books, uniforms, and extracurricular activities.

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about our admission process.

When does the admission process open?

Admissions for the next academic session typically open in January and continue until spaces are filled. We recommend applying early to secure a spot.

Is there an entrance examination?

Students applying for Primary 2 and above are required to take an entrance assessment in English, Mathematics, and General Knowledge. This helps us place students in the appropriate class.

What is the student-to-teacher ratio?

We maintain a low student-to-teacher ratio of approximately 20:1 for primary and secondary, and 15:1 for nursery classes to ensure personalized attention.

Are there scholarship opportunities?

Yes, we offer merit-based scholarships to outstanding students. Academic scholarships covering up to 50% of tuition are available based on entrance assessment performance.

What payment methods are accepted?

We accept bank transfers, online card payments (via Paystack), and cash payments at our school office. Payment plans are available upon request.

Can I visit the school before applying?

Absolutely! We encourage prospective parents to schedule a campus visit. Contact our admissions office to book a tour.

Ready to Apply?

Start your child's educational journey with Elyon Schools today. Our online application takes just 15 minutes to complete.
